response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matches the provided reference lyrics closely, with some ciphered on-screen text ('Zpu mui z yf vmn' representing 'Ciao ciao!') which was corrected to match the actual vocalized speech. 2. JSON Usage: Fully integrated the lyrics and corrected the ciphered sections using the Primary Fallback (burnt-in lyrics) on screen. Manual transcription was applied for the introductory and ending spoken dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to vocal boundaries to maintain perfect alignment and prevent cascading delays, using rapid sequential timing where necessary.

subtitles.original: Oh, and what did you like the most?
subtitles.english: Oh, and what did you like the most?

subtitles.original: And there's just this news flash!
subtitles.english: And there's just this news flash!

subtitles.original: We interrupt your regularly scheduled programming to bring you this breaking news.
subtitles.english: We interrupt your regularly scheduled programming to bring you this breaking news.

subtitles.original: We have just received an exclusive update from Justice, the global guardians of peace.
subtitles.english: We have just received an exclusive update from Justice, the global guardians of peace.

subtitles.original: Rumor has it a brand new track from the iconic four-piece is about to drop at any second.
subtitles.english: Rumor has it a brand new track from the iconic four-piece is about to drop at any second.

subtitles.original: I repeat, new music from Justice is imminent.
subtitles.english: I repeat, new music from Justice is imminent.

subtitles.original: We will be right back with the world premiere.
subtitles.english: We will be right back with the world premiere.

subtitles.original: This is Ouro Kronii, signing out.
subtitles.english: This is Ouro Kronii, signing out.

subtitles.original: If you're feeling trapped, send out a signal right above!
subtitles.english: If you're feeling trapped, send out a signal right above!

subtitles.original: We'll find you, set you free then you can sign up for the club!
subtitles.english: We'll find you, set you free then you can sign up for the club!

subtitles.english: Feeling happy time, no sad, say bye bye

subtitles.english: Justice we are justice, make the baddies go boom!
